_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Silksong Multiplayer (SSMP)
author: twangymoney@gmail.com

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
apk add --no-cache curl unzip jq

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo "Getting latest release URL..."
DOWNLOAD_URL=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/Extremelyd1/SSMP/releases/latest | jq -r '.assets[] | select(.name == "SSMPServer-linux.zip") | .browser_download_url')

echo "Downloading from: ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
curl -L -o SSMPServer-linux.zip "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

echo "Extracting files..."
unzip -o SSMPServer-linux.zip
rm SSMPServer-linux.zip

echo "Listing files:"
ls -la

echo "Setting permissions..."
chmod +x SSMPServer

echo "Installation complete!"
